mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TAB_WAREHOUSE (S_ID, S_TENANT_ID, S_CODE, S_NAME, I_LOCATION_TYPE, I_STATUS, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER) VALUES (#{sId}, #{sTenantId}, #{sCode}, #{sName}, #{iLocationType}, #{iStatus}, #{dtCreateTime}, #{dtUpdateTime}, #{sCreateUser}, #{sUpdateUser})
mapper.update: UPDATE TAB_WAREHOUSE SET S_CODE = #{sCode}, S_NAME = #{sName}, I_LOCATION_TYPE = #{iLocationType}, I_STATUS = #{iStatus}, DT_UPDATE_TIME = #{dtUpdateTime}, S_UPDATE_USER = #{sUpdateUser} WHERE S_ID = #{sId}
mapper.select: SELECT S_ID, S_CODE, S_NAME, I_LOCATION_TYPE, I_STATUS, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER FROM TAB_WAREHOUSE WHERE S_ID = #{sId}

SELECT S_ID, S_CODE, S_NAME, I_LOCATION_TYPE, I_STATUS, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER FROM TAB_WAREHOUSE
ORDER BY DT_CREATE_TIME DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TAB_STOCK WHERE S_WAREHOUSE_ID = #{warehouseId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TAB_STOCK_FLOW WHERE S_WAREHOUSE_ID = #{warehouseId}
